name: GOLFTEC Des Plaines
address: 353 N River Rd, Des Plaines, IL 60016
about: GOLFTEC is a nationwide golf training center focused on data-driven instruction and club fitting using advanced technology. The venues utilize high-speed cameras, launch monitors, and OPTIMOTION motion capture systems to provide detailed swing analysis and personalized coaching. They offer a range of services including golf lessons, custom club fitting, and practice memberships, targeting golfers looking for structured improvement with professional guidance.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion tracking and launch monitors for precise swing analysis
Personalized lesson plans and coaching based on data-driven insights
Custom club fitting services with launch monitor optimization

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced launch monitor technology used for club and ball data measurement

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, GOLFTEC provides equipment for lessons and fittings. They also offer club rentals and pro shop services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services at GOLFTEC locations, so outside food and drink are likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes varies by location and simulator setup, but typically ranges from 2-3 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is GOLFTEC kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior golf programs and coaching, making it suitable for young golfers. However, specific age policies or family-friendly amenities may vary by location.
